title: Flow of Exception Handling with 'throws'
description: This flowchart illustrates how the 'throws' keyword propagates a checked exception up the call stack, from the method where it occurs to a method that handles it with a try-catch block.
elements: Method C (Deeper Callee) where exception occurs
relationships: Method A calls Method B, which declares it 'throws' the exception
Method B calls Method C, where the exception is thrown
The exception propagates from Method C, through Method B, and is finally caught and handled in Method A
